calendar.matters:
ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: ACCOUNTING #1, REPORT
Off Calendar Nov-14-2017 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: David Mansour for Daniel Torres (Respondent/Trustee).

The Court noted that no one else was present. Mr. Mansour stated that he is not anticipating anyone to appear and oppose this, and that the other petitions can go off calendar. The Court granted the Petition for Order Approving Settlement Agreement and Mutual Release (order signed in open Court). The Petition to Remove Trustee, etc. and First Account and Report of Trustee are off calendar.

Judge: Peter J. Busch. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Deputy: M. Nuque. Not reported.

Petition For Order Approving Settlement Agreement And Mutual Release
Off Calendar Nov-14-2017 Granted Per Written Order

Petition To Remove Trustee And Appoint Successor Trustee
Off Calendar Nov-14-2017 Off Calendar

ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: ACCOUNTING #1, REPORT
Off Calendar Aug-16-2017 Continued To Nov-14-17 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

Petition To Remove Trustee And Appoint Successor Trustee
Off Calendar Aug-16-2017 Continued To Nov-14-17 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

Petition To Remove Trustee And Appoint Successor Trustee
Off Calendar Jun-20-2017 Continued To Aug-16-17 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: ACCOUNTING #1, REPORT
Off Calendar Jun-07-2017 Continued To Aug-16-17 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

Petition To Remove Trustee And Appoint Successor Trustee
Off Calendar Apr-26-2017 Continued To Jun-20-17 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

Petition To Remove Trustee And Appoint Successor Trustee
Off Calendar Feb-15-2017 Continued To Apr-26-17 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Michael Miller for and with Hector Torres (Petitioner).
Graham Douds for and with Daniel Torres (Respondent/Trustee).

Mr. Miller stated that the accounting is a fundamental issue, that they need information, that there is no tax identification number, that they want an accounting within 30-days with documents, that one piece of property was sold, and that there has been no accounting and no distribution. Mr. Douds stated that he received no response to the questions he presented, requested a 60 to 90-day continuance, stated that his Client hired a CPA and intends to get the 2014 and 2015 taxes filed, and that an accounting is being prepared. The Court orders that an accounting be prepared and provided no later than April 12, 2017. All other issues are bifurcated. The Petition to Remove Trustee and Appoint Successor Trustee is continued to April 26, 2017 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204. The Court expects that the parties by then will have had the opportunity to review the accounting and see where it stands, and that the parties have had the chance to talk to each other. The Court also encourages the parties to share information with each other. Mr. Miller is to prepare a form of order and provide it to Mr. Douds.

Judge: Peter J. Busch. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Deputy: A. Jaime. Not reported.
